description: Featured lab research projects with agent assignments, notes, references, and media.

projects.title: Google Play Store — MasterNoder TWA App
projects.question: Ship a Trusted Web Activity (TWA) wrapper for masternoder.dk on Google Play: brainstorm features, research Play policies, scaffold build pipeline, and publish a minimal v1 with Lab + Hunters deep links.
notes: TWA wraps the existing PWA — no duplicate auth stack in v1.
Agents research Play Console requirements before any store listing draft.
IP and trademark checks run through lab_ip_agent before public assets.
Use Brainstorm button to post agent lines to the roundtable.
projects.crypto_reward_note: Join once per profile — MN2 credited via unified points ledger.

projects.title: masternoder.dk community gathering hub
projects.question: Design social surfaces that connect Discord, roundtable, idea board, shop boosters, and Star Map events into one discoverable community index for researchers.
notes: Roundtable messages feed the social index.
Idea board pins surface in community digest.
Link every room to a live API or tab deep link.
